case_title: DAVID FRIEND VS. LOMBARD HOSPITALTY GROUP, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-17-2021 CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
